apiUrl.label: API URL
apiUrl.help: URL of the mem0-stack-oss API server

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for authentication (or use ${MEM0_API_KEY})

identity.label: Identity Config
identity.help: User/agent/app identity mapping. defaultUserId, defaultAgentId, appId, userMapping, agentMapping.

autoCapture.label: Auto-Capture
autoCapture.help: Automatically store conversation context after each agent turn

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Automatically inject relevant memories before each agent turn

enableGraph.label: Enable Graph Memory
enableGraph.help: Enable graph memory for entity relationships

customInstructions.label: Custom Instructions
customInstructions.placeholder: Only store user preferences and important facts...
customInstructions.help: Natural language rules for what Mem0 should store or exclude

searchThreshold.label: Search Threshold
searchThreshold.help: Minimum similarity score for search results (0-1)

topK.label: Top K Results
topK.help: Maximum number of memories to retrieve
